Who We Are

Built on the
road. Proven
on every lane.

Raptors Linehaul is a Mississauga-based asset carrier with a decade of cross-border freight experience. We operate a modern fleet of 53-foot dry van trailers across Canada and the United States — running the lanes that matter, on the schedules that count.

When you book with Raptors, your freight moves on our trucks, with our drivers, under our watch. No middlemen. No excuses. Just delivery.

"We Don't Miss." — that's not a slogan. It's our standard.
30+
Dry Van Units
10yr
Anniversary 2026
48+
States & Provinces

What We Haul

Purpose-built
services for
serious freight.

🚚
Dry Van FTL
Full truckload dry van across North America. 53-foot trailers, food-grade plated, high-cube options for maximum density.
Core Service
⚡
Expedited & Team
Team driver coast-to-coast. West Coast without relay delays. When it must arrive fast, we don't hesitate.
Time-Critical
📦
Straight Truck + Tailgate
Liftgate-equipped straight truck with pallet jack on board. Dock-free pickups and deliveries, no loading dock needed.
Flexible
⚠
Hazmat Transport
Fully certified hazmat handling — compliant placarding, trained drivers, regulated freight moved right every time.
Certified
🔒
Bonded & Cross-Border
Canadian and US bonded carrier. Seamless cross-border movement with full customs documentation and in-bond authority.
Canada / USA
💎
High-Value Cargo
Vetted drivers, direct communication, chain-of-custody oversight for sensitive and high-value freight.
White Glove
